fact_nuggets.text: Aroma Veil (Japanese: Aroma Veil) is an Ability introduced in Generation VI. Prior to Generation VIII, it was the signature Ability of Spritzee and Aromatisse.
Signature Ability of Spritzee And Aromatisse

Effect [ edit | edit source ] In battle [ edit | edit source ] Aroma Veil prevents the Pokemon with this Ability and its allies (including non-adjacent allies) from being afflicted by Taunt , Torment , Encore , Disable , Cursed Body , Heal Block and Psychic Noise , and infatuation . Despite being a move that also prevents the use of moves, Imprison is not affected by this Ability. Psychic Noise will only inflict damage; its secondary effect will not activate against Pokemon with this Ability. Outside of battle [ edit | edit source ] Aroma Veil has no effect outside of battle.

In battle [ edit | edit source ] Aroma Veil prevents the Pokemon with this Ability and its allies (including non-adjacent allies) from being afflicted by Taunt , Torment , Encore , Disable , Cursed Body , Heal Block and Psychic Noise , and infatuation . Despite being a move that also prevents the use of moves, Imprison is not affected by this Ability. Psychic Noise will only inflict damage; its secondary effect will not activate against Pokemon with this Ability.
Protects allies against moves that affect their mental state.
